title: Rich Crispy Tunisian Cream Cheese Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy single cream dish perfect for a solo dinner featuring Mediterranean flavors with a touch of cheese to make it satisfying without compromising on dietary restrictions.
instructions: Mix cream cheese with olive oil and set aside.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic, onions, and bell peppers; sauté until vegetables soften.
Fold in the mixed herbs like dried oregano or basil for extra flavor.
Pour in cream cheese mixture and stir to combine evenly with vegetables.
Add cherry tomatoes and capers, giving everything a good mix again. Toss gently so as not to break up the tomatoes.
Transfer to an oven-safe dish and bake for 15 minutes until edges are golden brown and top is crispy.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
